chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-673 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 2783/2023 3.For hearing of main case 02-09-2025 None present for the petitioner. **** None present for the petitioner, nor any intimation has been received. Record reflects that on 06.04.2023, learned counsel for the petitioner was directed to satisfy this Court regarding the maintainability of the petition in terms of Article 212 of the Constitution, but today none has appeared on behalf of the petitioner. Perusal of record further reveals that the petitioner, being a civil servant, did not approach the Sindh Service Tribunal for redressal of his grievance which pertains to his promotion. This Court, therefore, lacks jurisdiction to entertain the matter in view of the express bar contained under Article 212 of the Constitution. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application being devoid of any merit is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
